news.t: VanEck Expands Emerging Market and Sector Investing Suites with Launch of India Select ETF (INDZ) and Communications Services TruSector ETF (TRUC)

holdings.infoBox: INDZ is an equity ETF with a total of 72 individual holdings. The top holdings are Reliance Industries stock at 3.43%, HDFC Bank at 3.16%, Maruti Suzuki India at 3.00%, State Bank of India at 2.85%, and Multi Commodity Exchange of India at 2.79%.

overview.description: The VanEck India Select ETF (INDZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in Indian companies of any market capitalization with strong long-term return profiles, high capital efficiency, and resilient business models. INDZ was launched on Feb 18, 2026 and is issued by VanEck.

data.title: VanEck Expands Emerging Market and Sector Investing Suites with Launch of India Select ETF (INDZ) and Communications Services TruSector ETF (TRUC)
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck launches two ETFs, INDZ and TRUC, to further building out the firm's emerging markets equity and TruSector ETF suites, respectively.
